name: Cmd.Extra

values.name: add
values.comment: Add new cmd to an existing pair.
values.type: Cmd msg -> ( model, Cmd msg ) -> ( model, Cmd msg )

values.name: addTrigger
values.comment: Add new trigger of Msg to an existing pair.
values.type: msg -> ( model, Cmd msg ) -> ( model, Cmd msg )

values.name: attempt
values.comment:
Similar to perform but takes `Result msg` and performs action only on `Ok`.

    attempted : Cmd String
    attempted =
      attempt <| Ok "I'm fine"

    attempt (Err "Failed") == Cmd.none
    --> True

values.name: fromMaybe
values.comment:
Construct from Maybe.

    stringCmd : Cmd String
    stringCmd =
      toString (Just 1)

    fromMaybe toString Nothing
    --> Cmd.none

values.name: fromResult
values.comment:
Construct from Result.

    resultCmd : Cmd String
    resultCmd =
      fromResult toString (Ok 1)

    fromResult toString (Err ())
    --> Cmd.none
values.type: (a -> msg) -> Result x a -> Cmd msg

values.name: maybe
values.comment:
Similar to attempt but works with `Maybe` instead

    maybeCmd : Cmd String
    maybeCmd =
        maybe <| Just 1

    maybe Nothing == Cmd.none
    --> True

values.name: perform
values.comment:
Cmd costructor.
Usefull when you want to artificially emit Cmd from update function.

    performed : Cmd String
    performed =
        perform "foo"

"real world" example:

    type alias Model =
        ()

    type Msg
        = Fire
        | FireRockets

    update : Msg -> Model -> ( Model, Cmd Msg )
    update msg () =
        case msg of
            Fire ->
                ( (), perform FireRockets )

            FireRockets ->
                Debug.crash "World ended:("

values.name: pure
values.comment:
Creates pair `model` with `Cmd.none`

    pair : ( String, Cmd msg )
    pair = pure "foo"

    pair
      |> Tuple.second
      |> ((==) Cmd.none)
    --> True

values.name: with
values.comment: Add Cmd to model to create a pair.
values.type: Cmd msg -> model -> ( model, Cmd msg )

values.name: withTrigger
values.comment: Trigger Cmd from Msg and create a pair
